texts.orig: 1.Rates are based on All-inclusive meal plan i.e. breakfast, lunch, dinner and selected drinks

texts.orig: 5.Single room rate policy: A maximum of 2 single rooms per group will be confirmed at single rates. Thereafter the applicable double rates will be applied.
